purpose_context.objective: Decompose collapse-lockstep promise into concrete interaction/boundary slices for manual scan planning.

protected_state: Detail region geometry and first boundary child geometry remain visually synchronized through collapse transition phases.

mutable_surfaces.notes: Begins collapse transition and seeds transitionSeq boundaries.
Records timing and geometry ordering under stress.

mutable_surfaces.ref: collapsed gate ownership and child reconciliation
mutable_surfaces.notes: Lag or ordering inversion can create transient seam drift.

interaction_families.statement: Row collapse transition updates detail region and boundary child over ordered transition sequences.
interaction_families.actor_scope: estimate row view + collapse animation pipeline + layout boundary owner

interaction_families.statement: Cell reuse and ownership handoff during collapse preserve the same boundary-child reconciliation target.
interaction_families.actor_scope: collapse animation pipeline + layout boundary owner

consistency_boundaries.statement: firstChildToDetailDeltaY stays within the lockstep envelope through collapse.
consistency_boundaries.representation_b: expected lockstep envelope from collapse phase
consistency_boundaries.notes: Matches current frame focus and anomaly id semantics.

consistency_boundaries.statement: Ownership handoff settles before child reconciliation uses the new collapsed gate owner.
consistency_boundaries.settlement_horizon: handoff event to first reconciliation tick
consistency_boundaries.notes: Captures ordering race suspected in seam divergence branch.

pressure_axes: cell reuse and ownership handoff timing

slice_candidates.rationale: Matches current anomaly-bearing frame and existing queued traversal task objective.
Follow-up slice if delta lockstep anomaly origin remains ambiguous.
